name: René Touzet
abstract: René Touzet y Monte (September 8, 1916, in Havana, Cuba – June 15, 2003, in Miami, Florida) was a Cuban composer, pianist and bandleader.

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: No, Rene Touzet came later. Gee, I forgot the name of the fellow. A good pianist, in Noro Morales band.
